part1:
Hello,

We see that your account has been inactive for more than 7 days.

👍 Need a helping hand?

**Are you organizing events and would like to create an agenda?**
Log in to your account and create an agenda dedicated to your organization.
Define the contribution settings for your agenda (**who** can publish events and whether you would like to enable **moderation** for event proposals).
Don’t worry, you can always come back and change your settings if you change your mind.

Find all the useful information on [our website](https://openagenda.com/fr/p/offres-organisateurs).
part2:
**Would you like to contribute to an existing agenda?**
OpenAgenda is **used by many organizations** to list and share event announcements from a wide range of organizers. **Identify the agenda of the initiative you would like to contribute to**:
part3: **Not sure?** Check out our documentation articles or contact our support team.
subject: We miss you on OpenAgenda!
